main.description: Record of a play session for a game, optionally including a review. Interaction settings are controlled by a social.respawn.feed.gate record with the same rkey.

edition.description: Edition of the game this session was played on.

dlc.description: Expansions or DLC included in this session.

review.description: A review attached to a log.

text.description: Display text. Spans marked with a spoiler facet are scrambled here; naive clients can render this field safely.

textWithSpoilers.description: Original text with spoiler spans unscrambled. Only present when the review contains spoiler facets.

containsSpoilers.description: Whole-review spoiler flag. Clients hide the review text until revealed, unless the viewer has the game in their collection with a completed play state.

media.description: References to Grain gallery records to display with the review.

external.description: Reference to an external document (e.g. standard.site) holding the full review.
